subcodes.first_line: O Generous One! Verily We did aforetime send unto thee a noble Book wherein was ordained every matter with detailed exposition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کریم قد ارسلنا الیک من قبل کتابا کریم فیه قدر من کل امر علی تفصیل من
subcodes.subjects: @fire and light; fire and water, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @consolation and comfort
